detail.change_summary: OpenAI announced Codex role-specific plugins, Sites preview, and annotations for workspace sharing and broader knowledge-work automation.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official announcement reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.
evidence_refs.selector: Codex role plugins, Sites, and annotations announcement

impacts.recommended_action: Review Codex governance, connected-app permissions, and workspace-sharing policies before enabling role plugins or shared Sites for non-engineering teams.
Confirm workspace-level controls and access policies before using Codex Sites preview with business data.
Confirm workspace-level controls and access policies before using Codex Sites preview with enterprise data.

limitations: APW records provider-announced availability and behavior changes only; exact workspace rollout and tenant eligibility may vary.
summary: OpenAI announced Codex role-specific plugins, Sites preview, and annotations, expanding Codex from coding workflows into broader workspace and knowledge-work automation.
title: OpenAI Added Codex Role Plugins, Sites, And Annotations

detail.change_summary: OpenAI announced that OpenAI frontier models and Codex are generally available on AWS, including Amazon Bedrock and AWS governance channels.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official announcement reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.
evidence_refs.selector: OpenAI on AWS general availability announcement

impacts.recommended_action: Evaluate whether AWS-native procurement, IAM, network controls, and Bedrock governance change the preferred route for OpenAI model or Codex adoption.
Compare Codex feature availability and data-governance controls across ChatGPT sign-in, OpenAI API key, and Amazon Bedrock API key configurations.
For regulated workloads, verify region availability, feature parity, and account approvals before migrating provider access paths.

limitations: APW records availability and channel facts only; it does not assert feature parity, account eligibility, or exact AWS regional coverage beyond the official announcement.
summary: OpenAI announced general availability of OpenAI frontier models and Codex on AWS, adding an AWS procurement, governance, and deployment channel for affected customers.
title: OpenAI Frontier Models And Codex Became Available On AWS

detail.change_summary: Anthropic announced Claude Opus 4.8 along with Claude Code dynamic workflows, effort controls, higher long-running-agent capacity, and cheaper fast mode.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official announcement reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Review Claude Code workflows that assume single-agent or short-running execution, and add usage controls before enabling larger dynamic workflow runs.
Check account and plan limits before treating larger Claude Code runs as free additional capacity.

estimated_cost_effect.magnitude: fast mode for Opus 4.8 is advertised as three times cheaper than previous models

impacts.recommended_action: Separate fast-mode usage from higher-effort usage when forecasting Claude Code spend and token-limit pressure.

limitations: APW records official announcement facts only; exact account-level rate limits and plan entitlements may vary.
summary: Anthropic announced Claude Opus 4.8 with Claude Code dynamic workflows, effort controls, expanded long-running agent behavior, and cheaper fast mode for affected users.
title: Anthropic Added Opus 4.8 Dynamic Workflows And Effort Controls
